settings.title: How I Work
settings.description: A behind-the-scenes look at the pace, direction, and energy Framelight brings to a session.

settings.text: Framelight was built for people who want images with polish but not performance. The approach is simple: keep the day moving, notice the details, and leave enough space for a gallery to feel true to the room it came from.

After years of photographing weddings, founders, and editorial commissions, the throughline has stayed the same: the best photographs happen when people trust the pace. That means clear communication before the shoot, calm guidance when it matters, and enough documentary instinct to catch what happens once everyone forgets about the camera.

settings.features:
+ Calm guidance without stiff posing
+ True-to-skin color and restrained retouching
+ Fast communication before and after the shoot
+ Coverage tailored to people, not templates
